title: Australian Government pensions and allowances
description: How to report pensions and allowances from the Australian Government in myTax.

content_blocks.text: We have pre-filled your tax return with payment summary information provided to us. Check for any of the following payments you received that are not pre-filled and ensure you add them:

items: disability support pension, if you have reached age-pension age
wife pension, if either you or your partner were of age-pension age
Defence Force income support allowance (DFISA) where the pension, payment or allowance to which it relates is taxable
DFISA-like payment from the Department of Veterans’ Affairs (DVA)
invalidity service pension, if you have reached age-pension age
your PAYG payment summary – individual non-business , or
a letter from the agency that paid your pension, allowance or payment stating the amount you received.

content_blocks.text: If you do not have this information, contact the agency that paid you.

items: For each payment summary that has not been pre-filled in your tax return, select Add and enter information into the corresponding fields.

content_text:
We have pre-filled your tax return with payment summary information provided to us. Check for any of the following payments you received that are not pre-filled and ensure you add them:
- age pension
- bereavement allowance
- carer payment
- disability support pension, if you have reached age-pension age
- education entry payment
- parenting payment (single)
- widow B pension
- wife pension, if either you or your partner were of age-pension age
- age service pension
- income support supplement
- Defence Force income support allowance (DFISA) where the pension, payment or allowance to which it relates is taxable
- DFISA-like payment from the Department of Veterans’ Affairs (DVA)
- invalidity service pension, if you have reached age-pension age
- partner service pension.
## Completing this section
You will need:
- your PAYG payment summary – individual non-business , or
- a letter from the agency that paid your pension, allowance or payment stating the amount you received.
If you do not have this information, contact the agency that paid you.
- For each payment summary that has not been pre-filled in your tax return, select Add and enter information into the corresponding fields.
- Select Save .
- Select Save and continue .
